TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kbaqeh, title = Kbaqeh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kbaqeh} }

S.FORM: alang Kbaqeh ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 34 buwan, 109 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 90 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 19 hi nya pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 77%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kbaqeh hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kbaqeh hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kbaqeh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kbaqeh hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kbaqeh hya' ga Piling. tay 'zil na Kbaqeh hya' ga Paqiy. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kbaqeh ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 34 buwan, 109 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 90 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 19 hi nya pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 77%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kbaqeh hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kbaqeh hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kbaqeh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kbaqeh hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kbaqeh hya' ga Piling. tay 'zil na Kbaqeh hya' ga Paqiy. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kβaqeħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kβaqeħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na kβaqeħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kβaqeħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kβaqeħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kβaqeħ ħjaʔ ɣa piliŋ. taj ʔzil na kβaqeħ ħjaʔ ɣa paqij. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
